title: OpenAI Lures Private-Equity Firms With 17.5% Guaranteed Returns As AI Rivals Race For Enterprise Deals
summary:
OpenAI Lures Private-Equity Firms With 17.5% Guaranteed Returns As AI Rivals Race For Enterprise Deals

            OpenAI, the maker of ChatGPT, is offering private-equity firms a more generous financial package than rival Anthropic as the two artificial-intelligence companies court buyout shops to create joint ventures aimed at raising fresh capital and accelerating the rollout of enterprise AI products.



To lure PE firms, OpenAI is promising investors a guaranteed minimum return of 17.5%, a
summary_ko: OpenAI는 ChatGPT를 통해 사립 자본 회사들에게 17.5%의 보장 수익을 제안하며, AI 경쟁사들이 기업 거래를 위해 경쟁한다.

title: STAT+: Doctronic raises $40 million as race to apply AI in clinical care heats up
summary: Doctronic, the startup behind a provocative experiment in Utah to renew drug prescriptions with a chatbot, has raised $40 million.
summary_ko: 도트로닉이 4,000만 달러를 투자받으며 임상 치료에서 AI를 적용하는 경쟁이 가열된다.

title: Earendil Labs, an AI-powered drugmaker, hauls in $787M
summary: The hefty funding will support a U.S.- and China-based startup that’s amassed a pipeline of nearly 20 drugs and formed two lucrative partnerships with Sanofi.
summary_ko: Earendil Labs는 인공지능 기반 의약품 개발사로, 7억 8,700만 달러의 자금을 확보했다. 이 자금은 미국과 중국에 기반을 둔 이 회사의 약 20개 의약품 파이프라인과 Sanofi와의 두 가지 수익성 있는 파트너십을 지원할 예정이다.

title: Novartis joins Lilly, AZ in China expansion with $480M commitment to boost manufacturing, R&D
summary: Novartis is investing more than 3.3 billion Chinese yuan (roughly $480 million) to soup up its manufacturing facility in Beijing and strengthen its R&D campus in Shanghai, where the company’s China headquarters are also located.
summary_ko: Novartis는 중국에서 제조와 연구 개발을 강화하기 위해 4,800만 달러를 투자했다. 이 투자는 중국의 제조 시설과 연구 개발 캠퍼스를 강화하는 데 도움이 될 것이다.

title: Novartis pays $2B to land a startup’s breast cancer drug
summary: Acquiring a unit of privately held Synnovation Therapeutics hands Novartis a prospect that might improve on medicines that, like its own Piqray, target tumors driven to growth by PIK3CA mutations.
summary_ko: Novartis는 Synnovation Therapeutics의 부문을 20억 달러에 인수하여 유방암 약물 개발을 강화했다. 이 약물은 PIK3CA 돌연변이에 의해 성장하는 종양을 표적으로 하는 기존 약물보다 개선된 효과를 나타낼 수 있다.

title: Lilly’s three-pronged obesity drug hits goal in large diabetes trial
summary: Retatrutide, a possible advance on GLP-1 drugs like Zepbound, significantly cut blood sugar and body weight in the study, a sign it might be similarly impactful against obesity.
summary_ko: Lilly의 3중 비만 약물 Retatrutide는 대규모 당뇨병 임상시험에서 목표를 달성했다. 이 약물은 GLP-1 약물보다 개선된 효과를 나타낼 수 있다.

title: Arikayce could become Insmed’s second blockbuster following late-stage win in lung infection
summary:
Insmed's Phase 3 trial win for Arikayce in a particular kind of lung infection sets up the drug to expand into the front-line setting — possibly giving the biotech a second projected blockbuster.

 The company said ...
summary_ko: Insmed의 Arikayce가 폐감염 치료제로 임상 3상에서 성공을 거두어, 앞으로 블록버스터가 될 가능성이 있다.

title: Nuclear Fuel Supply Chain Advancing Rapidly As Leading Reactor Developer X-energy Files For IPO
summary:
Nuclear Fuel Supply Chain Advancing Rapidly As Leading Reactor Developer X-energy Files For IPO

            X-energy submitted a draft registration statement to the SEC for an initial public offering of its Class A common stock. The company intends to list on the Nasdaq under the ticker “XE.”


X-energy has submitted a draft registration statement on form S-1 to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission related to the proposed initial public offering of X-energy’s Class A common stock. X-ener
summary_ko: 원자로 개발업체 X-energy가 IPO를 신청하면서 원자력 연료 공급망이 빠르게 발전하고 있습니다.

title: Palantir Seen On "Golden Path" As Pentagon Moves To Make Maven Battlefield System A Program Of Record
summary:
Palantir Seen On "Golden Path" As Pentagon Moves To Make Maven Battlefield System A Program Of Record 

            Palantir shares gained 4% by early afternoon trading after Reuters reported over the weekend that the Department of War plans to designate its Maven artificial intelligence system as an official program of record. Wall Street views this report as a bullish catalyst and a meaningful validation of Palantir's long-term role in military command-and-control AI software.

Reuters cited a
summary_ko: 펜타곤이 메이븐 전장 시스템을 프로그램으로 만들 계획으로 팔란티어의 주가가 상승했습니다.

title: Tesla And SpaceX To Build Massive "Terafab" Chip Factory In Austin
summary:
Tesla And SpaceX To Build Massive "Terafab" Chip Factory In Austin

            Elon Musk announced that his proposed “Terafab” chip factory will be built in Austin and operated jointly by Tesla and SpaceX, according to Yahoo Finance and Bloomberg.

The plan is to start with a smaller, highly advanced fabrication facility capable of producing and testing a wide range of chips, before expanding to a larger operation.

Musk argues the semiconductor industry isn’t scaling fast enough to meet his co
summary_ko: 테슬라와 스페이스X는 오스틴에 대규모 반도체 공장을 건설할 계획이다. 이 공장은 테라팹(Terafab)이라고 불리며, 테슬라와 스페이스X가 공동으로 운영할 예정이다.

title: STAT+: Epic says it has uncovered rot in patient record sharing. Will HHS act?
summary: A recent Epic lawsuit revealed a company allegedly posed as a provider to access patient records for law firms, prompting a call for increased oversight.
summary_ko: 에픽이 환자 기록 공유에서 부패를 발견함, 보건부가 행동할 것인가?

title: White House Reaches Tentative Crypto Regulatory Agreement: Report
summary:
White House Reaches Tentative Crypto Regulatory Agreement: Report

            Authored by Micah Zimmerman via BitcoinMagazine.com,

Key senators and the White House have reached a tentative agreement on cryptocurrency legislation aimed at resolving a dispute between banks and digital asset firms over stablecoin yields, according to Politico reporting.



The move could clear the way for a landmark crypto regulatory bill stalled in the Senate Banking Committee since January.

summary_ko: 백악관이 암호화폐 규제에 대한 잠정적인 합의를 달성

title: Apogee eczema data drive hype to new peak as threat to Lilly and Sanofi becomes clear
summary: Apogee Therapeutics has published phase 2 eczema data that suggest its anti-IL-13 antibody is a threat to Eli Lilly, Regeneron and Sanofi, prompting analysts to double their peak sales forecast to $5.2 billion.
summary_ko: 아포지 테라퓨틱스의 에크제마 치료제는 릴리와 산وفي의 제품에 대한 새로운 경쟁자로 부상하고 있다.

title: Oryon shines out of stealth with $21M to fight Parkinson's disease
summary: When Ron Cohen, M.D., CEO of Oryon Cell Therapies, recently dug into the company’s Parkinson’s disease data, he told Fierce Biotech it “sang” to him. The former internist-turned-biotech CEO knew a thing or two about Parkinson’s—an area Oryon is targeting with an autologous neuron replacement therapy designed to restore dopaminergic function.
summary_ko: 오리온 셀 테라ピー는 파킨슨병 치료를 위해 2100만 달러를 투자받았다.

title: Why Novartis Is Paying $2B for a Cancer Drug That Hits the Same Target as One of Its Own Products
summary:
Novartis already markets the PI3Kα inhibitor Piqray for breast cancer, but acquiring a Synnovation Therapeutics subsidiary brings an early clinical program that the pharma company claims could be best in the class of next-generation therapies for the target. Competitors include Eli Lilly, Relay Therapeutics, and OnKure Therapeutics. 
The post Why Novartis Is Paying $2B for a Cancer Drug That Hits the Same Target as One of Its Own Products appeared first on MedCity News.
summary_ko: Novartis는 이미 PI3Kα 억제제 Piqray를 보유하고 있지만, Synnovation Therapeutics의 자회사 인수를 통해 새로운 암 치료제를 개발할 수 있을 것으로 기대된다.

title: Wright And Lutnick Unveil $33 Billion Gas-Fired Mega-Project In Ohio With SoftBank
summary:
Wright And Lutnick Unveil $33 Billion Gas-Fired Mega-Project In Ohio With SoftBank

            SoftBank and American Energy Power Company (AEP) are launching a major new power initiative in Pike County, Ohio. The project transforms the former Portsmouth Gaseous Diffusion Plant site into a hub for 10 GW of generation capacity, including at least 9.2 GW of natural gas-fired output dedicated to supporting up to 10 GW of data center development.

title: STAT+: Pfizer’s Lyme vaccine results set up tricky regulatory path
summary: New results on Pfizer's Lyme disease vaccine, how the Middle East conflict could strain drug supply chains, and more biotech news in today's Readout newsletter.

title: Apogee strengthens case for longer-lasting eczema drug
summary: Company shares climbed by more than 20% on Phase 2 study results suggesting the therapy could provide sustained relief when administered once every three or six months.
summary_ko: Apogee의 새로운 피부염 치료제가 장기간 지속되는 효과를 보여주었습니다. 새로운 치료제 개발이 진행 중입니다.

title: WuXi AppTec’s bet on the US pays off as revenues dip elsewhere
summary:
WuXi AppTec’s sales are becoming even more increasingly dependent on the US despite the service provider not yet fully shaking off concerns over its ties with the Chinese military.

 The company
summary_ko: WuXi AppTec의 미국 사업이 성장하고 있으며, 이는 중국과의 관계에 대한 우려에도 불구하고 회사의 수익을 증가시키고 있습니다.

title: Why Pure DTC Doesn’t Work in Healthcare, Per Muse Capital
summary:
Rachel Springate, general partner at Muse Capital, said the next wave of healthcare startups will be driven by consumer demand — but pure direct-to-consumer models rarely work. Companies like Midi Health, Mavida Health and Mahmee are showing a different path: starting with patients, collecting outcomes data, and integrating with clinicians, payers and the broader healthcare system.
The post Why Pure DTC Doesn’t Work in Healthcare, Per Muse Capital appeared first on MedCity News.
summary_ko: Muse Capital의 Rachel Springate는 향후 헬스케어 스타트업은 소비자 수요에 의해 주도될 것이라고 말했다. 그러나 순수한 DTC 모델은 잘 작동하지 않는다.

title: The Saga of Utah’s Rx Refill Bot: A Bold Bet on AI & Researchers Who Cried Foul
summary:
Utah is piloting an AI system developed by Doctronic to autonomously handle routine prescription refills, aiming to reduce delays and boost medication adherence. But a report from Mindgard AI claiming that there are vulnerabilities in the company’s chatbot underscores the broader challenge regulators and developers face in ensuring healthcare AI systems remain safe and reliable in real-world use.
The post The Saga of Utah’s Rx Refill Bot: A Bold Bet on AI & Researchers Who Cried Foul appeared fi
summary_ko: 유타주는 Doctronic이 개발한 AI 시스템을 사용하여 처방전을 자동으로 처리하는 것을 목표로 한다. 이는 지연을 줄이고 약물 순응도를 높일 수 있을 것으로 기대된다.

title: A Once in a Generation Opportunity to Reimagine Rural Health
summary:
Leaders must resist the urge to replicate urban models that do not translate well to rural contexts. Instead, they should design solutions that are built for rural communities, grounded in local insight and enabled by scalable capabilities. 
The post A Once in a Generation Opportunity to Reimagine Rural Health appeared first on MedCity News.
summary_ko: 농촌 지역의 의료 시스템을 재창조할 수 있는 기회가 도래했다. 도시 모델을 복제하는 대신, 지역 사회에 기반한 해결책을 설계해야 한다.

title: FCC Bans Foreign-Made Wireless Routers
summary:
FCC Bans Foreign-Made Wireless Routers

            The FCC has banned the import of all new foreign-made consumer wireless routers, citing "severe national security risks".



The decision, announced today, follows a White House-convened inter-agency review that determined these devices - primarily those manufactured overseas - pose unacceptable threats to US households, critical infrastructure, and the economy.

Major brands like TP-Link (which holds a dominant share of the U.S. market), Netge
summary_ko: 미국 연방 통신 위원회(FCC)가 외국에서 생산된 무선 라우터의 수입을 금지했습니다.

title: Apollo Private Credit Fund Is Latest To Gate Investors As KKR Fund Gets Junked By Moody's
summary:
Apollo Private Credit Fund Is Latest To Gate Investors As KKR Fund Gets Junked By Moody's

            Amid the ongoing fracturing of the private credit industry, which after enjoying years of stable, levered growth (and when it ran out of institutional greater fools, it aimed lower, toward HNWs and retail) finally hit a brick wall thanks to the Claude-inspired SaaSpocalypse, which has led to a historic surge in redemption requests across the biggest (and certainly smallest) names in the industr
summary_ko: Apollo의 사모 자산 펀드가 투자자에게 출금을 제한하는 가운데, KKR의 펀드가 무디스에서 저등급으로 평가되었습니다.

title: Gilead's $2.2B Ouro buyout delivers autoimmune T-cell engager, new purpose for Galapagos
summary: Gilead is paying $1.68 billion for a T-cell engager company via a front-loaded deal that could also give new meaning to its aimless partner Galapagos.
summary_ko: Gilead는 Ouro를 22억 달러에 인수했다. 이 인수는 Gilead에게 자가면역성 T細胞 엔진을 제공하며, Galapagos에게 새로운 목적을 제공한다.

title: Oil Jumps After Explosion And Massive Fire At One Of The Largest US Oil Refineries
summary:
Oil Jumps After Explosion And Massive Fire At One Of The Largest US Oil Refineries

            An explosion and large plumes of smoke at the Valero refinery in Port Arthur prompted officials to order west-side residents to shelter in place according to 12 News Now.
